chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No.1764 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.16908/2024. 21.11.2024 Mr. Maaz Waheed, advocate for the defendant No.3. Mr. Umer Ilyas Khan, advocate for the defendantNo.1. 1. Urgency granted. Under instructions counsel states that in view of the Judgment reported as 2024 YLR 1668 [Syed Muhammad Kazim & Another vs. Rub Razi Cooperative Housing Society Limited & Another], the plaint herein may be transferred for presentation before the learned Cooperative Court. Order accordingly. Judge Khuhro/PA
